query: ("heat warning system" OR "extreme heat alert" OR "heat health action plan" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat wave warning" OR "heatwave warning" OR "heat alert system" OR "heat advisory" OR "heat emergency response" OR "public health heat advisory" OR "weather forecast intervention" OR "temperature forecast advisory") AND ("cooling center" OR "cooling centre" OR "heat refuge" OR "heat wave preparedness" OR "heatwave preparedness" OR "heat mitigation" OR "heat stress prevention" OR "heat protection" OR "hot weather") AND ("heat-related mortality" OR "heat-related death" OR "temperature-mortality" OR "cardiovascular mortality" OR "respiratory morbidity" OR "emergency department visit" OR "heat hospitalization" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat-related illness" OR "heat stroke" OR "heat illness") AND ("regression discontinuity" OR "interrupted time series" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "difference in differences" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "instrumental variable" OR "causal inference" OR "policy effectiveness" OR "program evaluation" OR "impact evaluation" OR "counterfactual" OR "synthetic control" OR "propensity score")
